Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canada Elections Act and to make a consequential amendment to another Act (political financing)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Canada Elections Act and to make a consequential amendment to another Act (political financing)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canada Elections Act regarding the contribution limits and the computation of the fund paid to registered political parties. It also makes a consequential amendment to the Income Tax Act as to the eligible amount of a monetary contribution made to a registered party, a registered association or a candidate.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Paragraphs 367(1)(a) to (d) of the Canada Elections Act are replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: $500 in total in any calendar year to a particular registered party;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: $500 in total in any calendar year to the registered associations, nomination contestants and candidates of a particular registered party;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: $500 in total in any calendar year to a candidate who is not the candidate of a registered party; and

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: $1000 in total in any calendar year to the leadership contestants in a particular leadership contest.

Section.Text: Subsection 445(2) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: An allowance fund for a quarter is the product of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: $0.4375 multiplied by the number of valid votes cast in the election referred to in subsection (1); and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the inflation adjustment factor determined under section 384 that is in effect for that quarter.

Heading.TitleText: Consequential Amendment to the Income Tax Act

Section.Text: Subsection 127(3) of the Income Tax Act is amended by adding âandâ at the end of paragraph (a) and by replacing paragraphs (b) and (c) by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: when that total exceeds $400, $300 plus 50% of the amount by which that total exceeds $400,
